decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to establish a fast and aggressive board presence with low-cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo. Earthbender Ascension can generate additional value by tapping creatures, while Mightform Harmonizer and Demolition Field provide additional boosts to your creatures. Ba Sing Se and Sapling Nursery can help protect your creatures and generate tokens for added pressure. The deck also includes some control elements with Meltstrider's Resolve and Royal Treatment to help maintain your board advantage and push for a quick victory.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of cheap spells and efficient creatures. The key strategy revolves around casting creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off early on, while utilizing card draw spells like Sleight of Hand and Opt to maintain tempo. Burst Lightning provides additional removal and reach, while the inclusion of Stormchaser's Talent and Flow State helps to support the aggressive game plan. The deck also includes some disruptive elements like Boomerang Basics and Eddymurk Crab to handle threats from the opponent.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and board wipes to disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also includes a mix of lands that provide various colors of mana and utility abilities to adapt to different situations. The deck aims to outlast the opponent and eventually win through card advantage and efficient removal, while also having some versatile creatures and spells to finish the game when the time is right.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure through a combination of low-cost spells and creatures in an aggressive manner. The deck focuses on utilizing cards that can deal damage efficiently while maintaining card advantage to outpace the opponent. It aims to control the tempo of the game by utilizing spells to clear the path for its creatures and keep the opponent on their toes. The deck also utilizes a combination of land cards and versatility in card choices to adapt to different situations and maintain a consistent offensive strategy.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy, utilizing low-cost creatures with abilities that deal damage quickly to overwhelm the opponent. By combining creatures like Hardened Academic and Iron-Shield Elf with spells like Burst Lightning and Cool but Rude, the deck aims to maintain board presence and pressure the opponent's life total. With a mix of creature removal, burn spells, and efficient creatures, this deck aims to close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Ba Sing Se and Badgermole Cub. By utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and pump spells. The inclusion of mana accelerants like Llanowar Elves and card draw engines like Esper Origins ensures consistent aggression. Escape Tunnel and Meltstrider's Resolve provide evasion and protection for key creatures, while Fabled Passage helps fix mana. The deck's goal is to establish dominance early and maintain pressure throughout the game.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, allowing you to play powerful creatures like Sazh's Chocobo and Earthbender Ascension early on. The deck also utilizes cards like Escape Tunnel and Meltstrider's Resolve to protect your creatures and ensure they can attack without being blocked. Additionally, cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Badgermole Cub provide additional buffs and support to create a fast-paced and aggressive playstyle. By overwhelming your opponent with early aggression and efficient creatures, you aim to quickly deplete their life total and secure a victory.

The main focus of this combo-reanimator deck is to utilize cards that can reanimate powerful creatures such as Emeritus of Ideation and Doomsday Excruciator. By combining cards like Requiting Hex and Restless Reef with Superior Spider-Man and Winternight Stories, the deck can quickly bring these creatures back from the graveyard to dominate the battlefield. Additionally, spells like Deadly Cover-Up and Duress help control the opponent's resources while cards like Bitter Triumph and Gloomlake Verge provide additional value. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with big threats and resource denial.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with damage. It includes cards that can bounce opponent's creatures (Boomerang Basics), pump up creatures (Flow State), and provide card advantage (Sleight of Hand, Opt). The deck aims to control the board with efficient removal spells and push through damage with evasive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off. It also includes some utility lands like Riverpyre Verge and Great Hall of the Biblioplex to add flexibility to the deck's mana base.

The main idea of this Boros Control deck is to use a combination of artifacts and planeswalkers to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By utilizing cards like Aang's Iceberg, Saheeli's Lattice, and Torch the Tower, the deck can efficiently remove threats and create advantage. The mana base is designed to provide consistent access to both red and white mana sources, ensuring that the player can cast their spells on time. Overall, the deck aims to establish board control and outvalue the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost and efficient spells to control the board and deal damage to the opponent. It aims to create tempo advantage by bouncing opponent's threats, protecting its own creatures with counter spells, and utilizing burn spells to close out games. The deck's strategy is to be proactive and aggressive, utilizing its UR color combination to have a mix of burn and control elements to effectively disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a fast clock to pressure them.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with an aggressive strategy, utilizing a mix of creature cards like Bloodghast, Marauding Mako, Iron-Shield Elf, and Cecil, Dark Knight. The deck also includes powerful spells like Burst Lightning and Practiced Offense to further pressure the opponent. With a solid mana base and support cards like Cool but Rude and Hardened Academic, this deck aims to keep up the pressure and close out games swiftly before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

This deck focuses on playing aggressively with low-cost spells and creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. Using cards like Eddymurk Crab and Stormchaser's Talent along with spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, the goal is to control the board while steadily damaging the opponent. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Stock Up to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The mana base is built to support the deck's blue and red spells, with options for additional utility with cards like Multiversal Passage and Spell Pierce.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of spells and creatures in the Izzet colors of blue and red. The deck includes a variety of removal spells, versatile creatures, and card draw options to maintain board control and outvalue opponents. By carefully managing resources and using powerful spells like Combustion Technique and Iroh's Demonstration, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's plans while setting up for a powerful win condition with cards like Firebending Lesson and Boomerang Basics.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of card draw, removal, and board wipes. It aims to outvalue the opponent by generating card advantage and clearing the opponent's threats. Using a mix of instant speed spells and activated abilities, the deck can disrupt the opponent's game plan and control the pace of the game. With a strong mana base and card advantage engines, the deck can outlast the opponent and win through attrition. The key strategy is to stay ahead in resources and maintain control of the board.

The deck focuses on controlling the game with a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. It aims to outvalue the opponent by generating card advantage through effects like Jeskai Revelation and Consult the Star Charts. The deck also includes versatile cards like Abrade and Lightning Helix for removal and burn. With a mana base that can support its diverse color requirements and a mix of control tools, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its win conditions, such as North Wind Avatar or overwhelming with card advantage.
